title: Moroccan Flatbread
description: A simple and flavorful flatbread recipe inspired by Moroccan cuisine.
instructions: Roll out the Moroccan flatbread to desired thickness.
Spread the sour cream over the flatbread, leaving a small border around the edges.
Crumble the feta cheese over the sour cream.
Sprinkle a pinch of salt over the feta cheese.
Fold the flatbread in half to enclose the filling.
Cut the flatbread into triangles or squares.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
